faq.q: Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Costa del Sol?
faq.a: No, you do not need a licence. Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski is operated under the supervision of a licensed skipper who accompanies you. Safety briefing and life jackets are provided.

faq.q: How many people can ride on one jet ski?
faq.a: Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski accommodates up to 3 persons. It is 3.4m long and perfect for a family or group of friends. For larger groups, we recommend combining with a boat charter.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski rental depart from?
faq.a: All rentals depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. This is the most iconic marina on the Costa del Sol, just 10 minutes from Marbella city centre. We meet at the dock and brief you before departure.

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski rental price?
faq.a: Every rental includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees – just show up and ride.

faq.q: Can I rent a jet ski for a full day?
faq.a: Yes, you can. Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) are available for 8-hour charters from €2,299, which include a jet ski as part of the experience. Alternatively, book the Mangusta 80 from €4,719/4h with a free jet ski included.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for jet skiing in Costa del Sol?
faq.a: The Costa del Sol offers great conditions from April to October. Water temperatures range from 16°C in spring to 24°C in summer. Summer months (June–September) have calm seas and 30°C air temperatures.

faq.q: Can I combine a jet ski with a boat charter?
faq.a: Absolutely. Our Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski when you charter for 4+ hours. It’s the ultimate way to enjoy both luxury cruising and high-speed water sports in one trip.

faq.q: How do I book a jet ski rental in Costa del Sol?
faq.a: Simply contact us via WhatsApp. For Tier A boats and the Mangusta 80, prices are listed above. For all other boats, we provide custom quotes. Book at least 24 hours in advance for best availability.

data.body_html:
Experience the thrill of jet ski rental Costa del Sol from Puerto Banús, Marbella. Whether you want a solo ride on our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski (3.4m, 3 pax) or combine it with a luxury boat charter, we have options for every group. All rentals include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance. No licence needed – just bring your sense of adventure.

Why Choose Jet Ski Rental Costa del Sol?

The Costa del Sol offers over 320 days of sunshine a year, with average summer temperatures of 30°C and water temperatures around 24°C. Our jet ski rental departs from Puerto Banús, the most glamorous marina on the coast. You can explore the coastline from Marbella to Cabopino, spot the iconic La Concha mountain, and feel the wind in your hair. Our Sea-Doo GTX is the most powerful and stable model, perfect for beginners and experienced riders alike.

Every rental is fully inclusive: no hidden costs. You get a licensed skipper who ensures safety, fuel for the entire trip, unlimited water and soft drinks, plus beer, white wine, and cava. Light snacks and insurance are also included. All prices include Spanish IVA (21%).

Our Jet Ski and Boat Options

We offer two main ways to enjoy jet ski rental Costa del Sol:

  • Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski – 3.4m long, seats up to 3 persons. Departs Puerto Banús. Price on request via WhatsApp. Includes skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA.
  • Boat + Jet Ski combos – Our Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski when you charter for 4+ hours at €4,719. Or book a Tier A boat (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749/2h to €2,299/8h, and add a jet ski for an extra fee.

For larger groups, we also have Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax), Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax), and many more. All depart from Puerto Banús. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom rates.

What to Expect on Your Jet Ski Adventure

Your experience begins at Puerto Banús, where our team meets you at the dock. After a safety briefing and fitting of life jackets, you’ll head out onto the Mediterranean. The typical route takes you along the coast past the Golden Mile, Marbella’s famous beachfront, and towards Cabopino or even Estepona depending on the duration. You can stop for a swim, enjoy the onboard drinks and snacks, and take photos of the stunning coastline.

Our jet ski is easy to handle. The Sea-Doo GTX features intelligent brake and reverse (iBR) and a comfortable seat for three. Maximum speed is around 105 km/h (57 knots), but you can cruise at a relaxed pace. The skipper is always with you to ensure safety and guide you to the best spots.

Popular Destinations from Puerto Banús

From Puerto Banús, you can explore a variety of stunning locations:

  • Cala del Faro – A hidden cove with crystal-clear water, perfect for a swim stop.
  • Cala Cortés – Another secluded beach, ideal for snorkelling.
  • Marbella Marina – The old port with its traditional fishing boats and restaurants.
  • Cabopino – A quiet beach with dunes and a nature reserve.
  • Estepona – A charming town with a picturesque old town and marina.

Your skipper can tailor the route to your preferences. Whether you want to see the luxury villas of the Golden Mile or the natural beauty of the coast, we can make it happen.

Pricing and Booking

We keep pricing transparent. Here’s a quick overview:

OptionDurationPrice (incl. all)
Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski (3 pax)CustomVia WhatsApp
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 39 (9–11 pax)2 hours€749
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 39 (9–11 pax)8 hours€2,299
Mangusta 80 (12 pax + free jet ski)4 hours min€4,719

All prices include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and IVA. For other boats (e.g., Azimut 58, Ferretti 94, etc.), please contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote. Book at least 24 hours in advance for best availability.

Why Book with Boat Rental Marbella?

We are a local company based in Puerto Banús, Marbella. Our fleet includes 20+ boats from 6.4m speedboats to 29m superyachts. We are not an affiliate – we own and operate these vessels. Our team knows the coast intimately and will ensure you have an unforgettable day. We pride ourselves on transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and exceptional service. Check out our [full fleet](/ ) for more options.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Costa del Sol?

No, you do not need a licence. Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski is operated under the supervision of a licensed skipper who accompanies you. Safety briefing and life jackets are provided.

How many people can ride on one jet ski?

Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski accommodates up to 3 persons. It is 3.4m long and perfect for a family or group of friends. For larger groups, we recommend combining with a boat charter.

Where does the jet ski rental depart from?

All rentals depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. This is the most iconic marina on the Costa del Sol, just 10 minutes from Marbella city centre. We meet at the dock and brief you before departure.

What is included in the jet ski rental price?

Every rental includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees – just show up and ride.

Can I rent a jet ski for a full day?

Yes, you can. Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) are available for 8-hour charters from €2,299, which include a jet ski as part of the experience. Alternatively, book the Mangusta 80 from €4,719/4h with a free jet ski included.

What is the best time of year for jet skiing in Costa del Sol?

The Costa del Sol offers great conditions from April to October. Water temperatures range from 16°C in spring to 24°C in summer. Summer months (June–September) have calm seas and 30°C air temperatures.

Can I combine a jet ski with a boat charter?

Absolutely. Our Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski when you charter for 4+ hours. It’s the ultimate way to enjoy both luxury cruising and high-speed water sports in one trip.

How do I book a jet ski rental in Costa del Sol?

Simply contact us via WhatsApp. For Tier A boats and the Mangusta 80, prices are listed above. For all other boats, we provide custom quotes. Book at least 24 hours in advance for best availability.
